chat.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
chat.pendingQueued: Message queued, will send after reply...
chat.deleteSessionWarning: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
chat.toolPermissionAutoDesc: Model decides whether approval is needed

codexAuth.expiredDescription: Your Codex OAuth token is no longer valid. Please sign in again to continue.

provider.title: Providers
provider.selectProvider: Select a provider to get started
provider.codexSecurityWarning: For your account security, Claude Code authentication mode is not available at this time
provider.name: Name
provider.leaveEmptyNoAuth: Leave empty, fill in if authentication is needed
provider.apiKeyLeaveEmpty: API Key (leave empty to keep unchanged)
provider.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this provider?
provider.authRequired: Fill in if authentication is needed

model.atLeastOneModel: Add at least one model to continue

settings.title: Settings
settings.modelConfigDesc: Manage model providers and global model settings
settings.toolsDesc: Configure web search, web fetch and other tools
settings.skillsDesc: Skills provide domain expertise for the AI assistant and are automatically injected into the system prompt. Place skill folders in:
settings.noSkillsHint: Create a skill folder with a SKILL.md in ~/.opencomputer/skills/, or import another directory
settings.skillEnvVarsDesc: Configure the API keys and tokens required by this skill
settings.memoryDesc: Persistent memories that help the AI remember context across conversations
settings.coreMemoryGlobalDesc: Rules and preferences shared across all agents, always visible in conversations
settings.coreMemoryAgentDesc: Rules and preferences specific to this agent, always visible in conversations
settings.openclawMemoryHint: Core memory is fully compatible with OpenClaw's MEMORY.md — same format, fully interoperable.
settings.coreMemoryPlaceholder:
Write rules and preferences you want the AI to always remember...
e.g.: Reply in English, no code comments, use pnpm only
settings.memoryFlushDesc: Auto-extract important info before context compression
settings.memoryEmpty: No memories yet. Add your first memory to help the AI remember important context.
settings.memoryEmbeddingDesc: Configure embedding models for semantic memory search. Without this, only keyword search is available.
settings.memoryEmbeddingEnabledDesc: Use embedding models to find semantically similar memories
settings.memoryDuplicateFound: Similar memories found — do you want to add anyway or update an existing one?
settings.memoryImportFromAIDesc: Ask another AI assistant to summarize what it knows about you, then paste the result here.
settings.memoryImportFromAIStep1: Step 1 — Copy this prompt and send it to another AI
settings.memoryImportFromAIStep2: Step 2 — Paste the AI's response below
settings.memoryImportFromAIPastePlaceholder: Paste the JSON array returned by the other AI here...
settings.memoryImportFromAIEmpty: Please paste the AI response first.
settings.memoryAutoExtractDesc: Automatically extract memories when token, time, or message thresholds are met
settings.memoryDedupAdvancedDesc: Adjust RRF similarity thresholds for memory deduplication. Higher values make it easier to detect duplicates.
settings.memoryEmbeddingAutoDesc: Automatically selects the best available embedding provider (local model first, then reuses configured LLM API keys). No extra setup needed.
settings.memorySearchTuningDesc: Adjust hybrid search weights, temporal decay, and diversity reranking parameters.
settings.memoryTemporalDecayDesc: When enabled, older memories gradually rank lower in search (pinned memories are exempt).
settings.memoryMmrDesc: Uses MMR algorithm to avoid redundant results and improve diversity in search output.
settings.memoryEmbeddingCacheDesc: Caches computed vectors to avoid redundant API calls for repeated text, saving cost.
settings.memoryMultimodalDesc: Enable image/audio file embedding. Only supported with Google Gemini gemini-embedding-2-preview model.
settings.memoryMultimodalRequiresGemini: Multimodal embedding requires Google Gemini with gemini-embedding-2-preview model
settings.sandboxDesc: Configure Docker container sandbox isolation for secure command execution
settings.channelsDesc: Manage Telegram, WeChat, Feishu, Discord, Slack and other IM channel integrations
settings.acpControlDesc: Manage external ACP agents (Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, etc.)
settings.acpEnabledDesc: Allow agents to spawn external ACP agents for task delegation
settings.acpAutoDiscoverDesc: Scan $PATH for known ACP agent binaries on startup
settings.sandboxDockerNotInstalled: Docker not detected, please install Docker Desktop first
settings.sandboxDockerNotRunning: Docker is installed but not running, please start Docker Desktop
settings.sandboxImageDesc: Docker image used for sandbox containers
settings.sandboxReadOnlyDesc: Mount root filesystem as read-only, only /workspace and /tmp are writable
settings.sandboxCapDropDesc: Remove all Linux capabilities to prevent privilege escalation
settings.sandboxNoNewPrivilegesDesc: Prevent child processes from gaining additional privileges
settings.sandboxNetworkModeDesc: Network access mode for the container
settings.webSearchDesc: Drag to reorder search providers. The first enabled provider will be used. Providers requiring an API key must have credentials configured before enabling.
settings.webSearchDockerNotInstalled: Docker not detected. Please install Docker Desktop first.
settings.webSearchDockerNotRunning: Docker is installed but not running. Please start Docker Desktop.
settings.webSearchDockerUseProxyDesc: When enabled, the current app/system proxy is written into Docker SearXNG. If your host VPN already handles routing, try turning this off and restarting or redeploying the container.
settings.webSearchDockerSaveConfigFailed: Failed to save SearXNG Docker settings. Save the settings and try again.
settings.webSearchDockerStepPullingImage: Pulling SearXNG image (may take a few minutes)…
settings.webSearchDockerStepHealthCheck: Waiting for SearXNG to be ready…
settings.webSearchDockerSearchFail: SearXNG connected but search returned no results
settings.webSearchCacheTtlDesc: Cache results for this duration (0 = disabled)
settings.webFetchDesc: Configure how the web_fetch tool extracts content from URLs, including caching, security, and content limits.
settings.webFetchMaxCharsDesc: Default maximum characters returned to the model
settings.webFetchMaxCharsCapDesc: Hard limit on max_chars parameter from tool calls
settings.webFetchMaxResponseBytesDesc: Maximum HTTP response body size to download
settings.webFetchCacheTtlDesc: How long to cache fetched pages. Set to 0 to disable caching.
settings.webFetchSsrfDesc: Block requests to private/internal network addresses
settings.imageGenerateDesc: Configure AI image generation providers (OpenAI, Google, Fal, MiniMax, SiliconFlow, ZhipuAI, Tongyi). Once enabled, Agent can generate and edit images via the image_generate tool.
settings.imageGenNoProvider: No provider configured. Enable one and enter an API Key to let Agent generate images.
settings.imageGenPriorityHint: Providers are tried in priority order with automatic failover
settings.canvasDesc: Interactive canvas tool: AI can create and manage HTML/Markdown/charts/slides and other visual content, rendered live in a preview panel.
settings.canvasAutoShowDesc: Automatically open the preview panel when canvas is created or updated
settings.canvasClearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all canvas projects? This cannot be undone.
settings.permDesc: OpenComputer needs the following system permissions to control your computer. Please grant them in System Settings.
settings.permAccessibilityDesc: Control mouse, keyboard and interact with other application windows
settings.permScreenRecordingDesc: Capture screen content and recognize UI elements
settings.permAutomationDesc: Control other applications via AppleScript (e.g. Finder, System Events)
settings.permAppManagementDesc: Update or delete other applications' data
settings.permFullDiskAccessDesc: Read and write protected files and directories
settings.permFilesAndFoldersDesc: Access Desktop, Documents, Downloads and other user directories
settings.permCameraDesc: Use the camera for visual recognition
settings.permLocalNetworkDesc: Discover and connect to devices on the local network
settings.permGrantTooltip: Opens System Settings to grant permission
settings.permRefreshHint: After granting in System Settings, click refresh or switch back to auto-detect
settings.chatAutoSendDesc: Automatically send queued messages after reply finishes. When off, message is filled back to input.
settings.chatAutoExpandThinkingDesc: Automatically expand thinking blocks in chat bubbles. When off, click to expand manually.
settings.planSubagentDesc: When enabled, Plan Mode uses a dedicated sub-agent for plan creation (cleaner main context). When disabled, planning runs inline in the main agent (context continuity).
settings.planQuestionTimeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for user response to Plan Mode questions. Auto-cancels the question on timeout. Set to 0 for no limit.
settings.contextCompactDesc: Automatically compress conversation context to prevent exceeding model limits
settings.contextCompactEnabledDesc: Automatically trim old tool results and summarize old messages when conversation gets long
settings.contextCompactMicrocompactEnabledDesc: Zero-cost clearing of old ephemeral tool results (ls/grep/find etc.), runs before other compression tiers
settings.contextCompactMicrocompactToolsDesc: Old results from selected tools will be automatically cleared
settings.contextCompactToolPolicyDesc: Control how each tool's results are handled during context compression
settings.contextCompactMaxToolResultShareDesc: Max share of context window a single tool result can occupy (10%–60%). Increase to preserve larger file reads and web fetches
settings.contextCompactSoftTrimRatioDesc: Start head+tail trimming of old tool results when context usage exceeds this ratio
settings.contextCompactHardClearRatioDesc: Replace old tool results with placeholders when still exceeding this ratio after soft trim
settings.contextCompactKeepAssistantsDesc: Tool results from the last N assistant replies are never pruned
settings.contextCompactToolsDenyDesc: Results from these tools are always kept in full, comma separated
settings.contextCompactSummarizationModelCacheHin: Uses prompt cache sharing with conversation model, ~90% cache hit rate for minimal token cost
settings.contextCompactSummarizationModelCustomHi: Independent API call without cache sharing, but you can use a cheaper model to reduce cost
settings.contextCompactSummarizationThresholdDesc: Trigger LLM summarization of old messages when still exceeding this ratio after pruning
settings.contextCompactPreserveTurnsDesc: Keep the last N conversation turns verbatim during summarization
settings.contextCompactIdentifierInstructionsPlac: e.g.: Preserve all file paths and URLs exactly, other IDs may be abbreviated
settings.contextCompactMaxSummaryCharsDesc: Maximum characters for compaction summary (4000–64000). Increase for richer context retention, but the summary itself takes more space
settings.contextCompactSoftTrimMaxChars: Min result size for soft trim
settings.contextCompactSoftTrimMaxCharsDesc: Tool results smaller than this are skipped during soft trim
settings.contextCompactCacheTtlDesc: Skip pruning/summarization if last compaction was within this time. Preserves API prompt cache. 0 = disabled
settings.contextCompactMinPrunableCharsDesc: Skip hard clear if total prunable chars below this value
settings.systemAutostartDesc: Automatically start OpenComputer when you log in to your computer
settings.proxySettingsDesc: Configure proxy for all HTTP requests
settings.proxyModeCustomDesc: Use a specific proxy server address
settings.toolTimeoutDesc: Max execution time per tool call. Prevents infinite hangs from network issues. Set to 0 to disable
settings.approvalTimeoutDesc: Max time to wait for a tool approval response. Set to 0 to disable
settings.approvalTimeoutActionDesc: What to do when approval wait times out
settings.toolResultDiskThresholdDesc: Results exceeding this size are saved to disk, with only a preview kept in context. Set to 0 to disable
settings.maxImagesDesc: Max images allowed in a single image tool call (cap: 20)
settings.maxPdfsDesc: Max PDFs allowed in a single pdf tool call (cap: 10)
settings.maxVisionPagesDesc: Max pages rendered as images per PDF in vision mode
settings.profileDesc: Set your personal info to help the AI assistant know you better. All fields are optional — it's entirely up to you what to share for your privacy.
settings.profileAiExpExpert: Expert — deep user of AI tools
settings.profileCustomInfoPlaceholder: Anything else you'd like the AI to know...
settings.weatherSectionDesc: Set your location to help AI understand your local weather
settings.weatherEnabledDesc: When enabled, AI will know your current weather conditions. Powered by Open-Meteo
settings.weatherFetchError: Failed to fetch weather or pending refresh
settings.weatherLocationFailed: Location detection failed, please search manually
settings.agentsDesc: Define and manage AI Agents. Each Agent can have a different identity, capabilities, and behavior.
settings.agentNewIdHint: Used as directory name, only letters, numbers, and hyphens
settings.agentCapabilitiesToolInjectionDesc: Choose which built-in tools this agent can use (internal system tools are always available)
settings.agentSkillsDesc: Globally enabled skills are available by default. You can disable specific ones for this Agent.
settings.agentRequireApprovalDesc: Control whether AI needs your confirmation before using tools
settings.toolExecDesc: Run shell commands with background and sandbox support
settings.toolProcessDesc: Manage background processes: list, poll, log, write, kill
settings.toolReadDesc: Read file contents with pagination and image detection
settings.toolWriteDesc: Write content to a file, auto-creates parent directories
settings.toolEditDesc: Search-replace edits, more precise than full write
settings.toolLsDesc: List files and directories in a path
settings.toolGrepDesc: Search file contents with regex or literal patterns
settings.toolApplyPatchDesc: Batch create, modify, delete, or move files
settings.toolWebSearchDesc: Search the web for real-time information
settings.toolWebFetchDesc: Fetch and extract content from web pages
settings.toolUpdateMemoryDesc: Update the content of an existing memory
settings.toolManageCronDesc: Create, modify, and delete scheduled tasks
settings.toolGetWeatherDesc: Fetch real-time weather data for a specified city
settings.toolSubagentDesc: Delegate tasks to subagent for execution
settings.toolTaskCreateDesc: Create a trackable task for the current session
settings.toolTaskUpdateDesc: Update the status or content of an existing task
settings.toolTaskListDesc: List all tasks in the current session
settings.agentSkillEnvCheckDesc: Before injecting a skill, verify its required binaries, env vars, and OS are available; skip if not met
settings.agentMdDesc: Describe this Agent's responsibilities, workflow, and principles
settings.agentMdPlaceholder: Write core instructions for this Agent...
settings.agentPersonaDesc: Define the Agent's personality, tone, and communication style
settings.agentToolsGuideDesc: Customize how the Agent uses tools
settings.agentRolePlaceholder: e.g. AI coding assistant, creative writer, research analyst...
settings.agentVibeDesc: Describe the overall feel of this Agent
settings.agentVibePlaceholder: e.g. warm and patient, sharp and direct, humorous...
settings.agentTonePlaceholder: Pick a preset or type custom tone
settings.agentTraitsDesc: Define the Agent's core personality traits
settings.agentTraitsPlaceholder: Type a trait and press Enter, e.g. detail-oriented, curious...
settings.agentPrinciplesPlaceholder: Type a principle and press Enter, e.g. Always explain reasoning...
settings.agentBoundariesDesc: Define what the Agent will and won't do
settings.agentQuirksDesc: Unique habits, catchphrases, or personality details
settings.agentQuirksPlaceholder: e.g. likes to use analogies, confirms understanding before answering...
settings.agentCommStyleDesc: How the Agent organizes and presents responses
settings.agentCommStylePlaceholder: e.g. verbose with examples, minimal and terse...
settings.agentIdentitySupplementDesc: Anything else you'd like to add?
settings.agentPersonaSupplementDesc: Anything else you'd like to add?
settings.agentOpenClawModeDesc: Use OpenClaw-style 4-file configuration (AGENTS.md, IDENTITY.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md)
settings.agentOpenClawModeWarning: When enabled, the Identity and Personality tabs are disabled. Agent behavior is defined entirely by the 4 markdown files below.
settings.openclawModeActiveHint: OpenClaw Compatible Mode is enabled. Edit these settings in the OpenClaw tab.
settings.agentAgentsMdDesc: Workspace rules, red lines, memory guidance, and behavioral instructions
settings.agentIdentityMdDesc: Agent name, creature type, vibe, emoji, avatar — simple identity metadata
settings.agentSoulMdDesc: Agent personality, values, tone, boundaries, core truths
settings.agentToolsMdOcDesc: Local environment notes: camera names, SSH hosts, TTS voice preferences, device nicknames
settings.agentCustomPromptDesc: When enabled, custom prompts are used instead of structured settings
settings.agentCustomPromptWarning: When enabled, the settings in Identity and Personality pages will no longer take effect. The AI will follow only the custom content below.
settings.agentCustomIdentityDesc: Custom Agent identity, responsibilities, and workflow
settings.agentCustomPersonaDesc: Custom Agent personality, tone, and communication style
settings.agentDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this Agent?
settings.subagentAllowedAgentsHint: Select which agents can be delegated to. Unchecked agents will be blocked.
settings.agentNoAgentsHint: Create a new Agent to customize AI behavior
settings.charLimitExceeded: Exceeded limit, excess content will be truncated
settings.fallbackModelsDesc: When the primary model is unavailable, try these models in order
settings.agentPlanModelDesc: Use a cheaper/faster model during the planning phase to reduce costs by 60-80%. The primary model is used during execution.
settings.globalTemperatureDesc: Controls randomness of model output. Lower values are more focused, higher values are more creative. Can be overridden per agent or per session.
settings.agentTemperatureDesc: Override global temperature for this agent. Reset to inherit from global settings.
settings.agentModelCustomDesc: Override global model settings with agent-specific model and fallback chain
settings.agentModelInheritHint: Currently inheriting global default and fallback model settings. Enable "Custom Model" to configure agent-specific models.
settings.agentModelInheritDesc: Uses the global default and fallback model settings
settings.logsDesc: View and manage detailed execution logs. Filter by level, category, and keyword search.
settings.logsClearDesc: This will permanently delete all log records. This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
settings.logsEnabledDesc: When disabled, no new logs will be recorded
settings.logsFileEnabledDesc: Output plain text log files for external tools and Agent self-inspection
settings.logsSelectFile: Select a file on the left to view
settings.devWarningDesc: The following actions will permanently delete data and cannot be undone. The app will restart automatically after execution.
settings.devClearSessionsDesc: Delete all chat history and attachments
settings.devClearCronDesc: Delete all scheduled tasks and run logs
settings.devResetConfigDesc: Reset all system settings to defaults
settings.devClearAllDesc: Clear all data and reset to defaults
settings.devConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. The app will restart to reinitialize. Are you sure?
settings.serverDesc: Configure server mode and remote connection
settings.serverModeDesc: Choose embedded mode or connect to a remote server
settings.serverModeEmbeddedDesc: Desktop app runs an HTTP server on localhost
settings.serverModeRemoteDesc: Connect to an external OpenComputer server
settings.serverEmbeddedBindDesc: Default 127.0.0.1 for localhost only. Set to 0.0.0.0 to expose to the network
settings.serverRestartRequired: Restart the app for embedded server changes to take effect

channels.title: IM Channels
channels.description: Connect Telegram, WeChat, Feishu, Discord, Slack and other IM platforms to chat with AI Agent
channels.noAccounts: No IM channel accounts configured yet
channels.telegramTokenHint: Get a Bot Token from Telegram @BotFather
channels.userAllowlistPlaceholder: Type a user ID and press Enter to add
channels.userAllowlistHint: Enter allowed sender IDs and press Enter to confirm
channels.wechatConnectionHint: Use QR login to obtain the WeChat token and long-poll base URL automatically. No manual token entry is required.
channels.wechatScanHint: Scan the QR code in WeChat and confirm on your phone.
channels.wechatScannedHint: QR code scanned. Confirm login in WeChat.
channels.wechatExpiredHint: QR code expired. Generate a new one and scan again.
channels.boundAgentHint: Select which Agent this channel will chat with. Different channels can bind different Agents.
channels.defaultRequireMentionHint: Bot only responds when @mentioned or replied to in groups. Each group can override this.
channels.groupConfigHint: Set per-group reply policies and permissions. Use * as ID for fallback defaults.
channels.groupAllowFromHint: Telegram user IDs allowed in this group. Empty = no restriction.
channels.groupSystemPromptPlaceholder: Inject extra system prompt for this group...
channels.channelConfigHint: Configure bot behavior for Telegram channels (broadcasts)
channels.autoApproveToolsHint: When enabled, all tool executions via this IM channel will be automatically approved without manual confirmation
channels.discordTokenHint: Create a Bot at Discord Developer Portal and copy the token
channels.slackTokenHint: Enable Socket Mode in your Slack App settings to get the App Token
channels.feishuTokenHint: Create a Bot in Feishu Open Platform and get App ID / App Secret
channels.qqbotTokenHint: Create a Bot at QQ Open Platform (q.qq.com) and get credentials
channels.ircHint: Connect to any IRC server with optional TLS encryption
channels.signalHint: Requires signal-cli installed and registered locally. Run 'signal-cli link' or 'signal-cli register' first.
channels.imessageHint: macOS only. Requires the imsg CLI tool installed and in your PATH.
channels.whatsappHint: Requires a WhatsApp bridge service running. Point to its HTTP API URL.
channels.gchatHint: Requires a Google Workspace service account with Chat API enabled
channels.webhookUrlHint: Desktop apps need a public URL (e.g. ngrok) to receive webhooks
channels.lineHint: Get credentials from LINE Developers Console (Messaging API channel)

cron.title: Scheduled Tasks
cron.name: Task Name
cron.cronHelp: Format: sec min hour day month weekday (e.g. 0 0 9 * * 1-5 = weekdays 9am)
cron.messagePlaceholder: The instruction sent to the agent when triggered, e.g. Summarize today's progress

notification.title: Notification Settings
notification.globalDesc: Receive native desktop notifications for background events
notification.agentDesc: Per-agent notification overrides. When set to Default, uses the global setting.
notification.cronNote: Cron task notifications can be configured per-job in the Scheduled Tasks settings panel.
notification.cronNotifyDesc: Send a desktop notification when this task finishes

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.desc: Customize global keyboard shortcuts. Click on a shortcut area and press a new key combination to change it.
shortcuts.actionQuickChatDesc: Toggle the quick chat overlay globally
shortcuts.hint: Shortcuts must include at least one modifier key (Cmd/Alt/Shift/Ctrl). Press Esc to cancel recording.
shortcuts.chordHint: Chord shortcuts supported: press a second combo within 1.5s to record a two-part shortcut (e.g. Ctrl+K Ctrl+C).

about.title: About
about.description: A local AI assistant desktop app built with Tauri 2 + React 19 + Rust

health.refreshTooltip: Refresh crash history and backup list
health.clearConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all crash history? This action cannot be undone.
health.noCrashes: No crash records. The application is running normally.
health.restoreConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to restore from this backup? Your current configuration will be overwritten.
health.guardianEnabledDesc: When enabled, the app will automatically restart on abnormal exits, and perform backup and AI-powered diagnosis on consecutive crashes. Takes effect on next launch.
health.recoveryBannerDesc: The app crashed {{count}} time(s) before this launch and was automatically restarted.

openrouter.name: OpenRouter
openrouter.description: Multi-model aggregation gateway, hundreds of models with one key

modelstudio.name: 阿里云百炼
modelstudio.description: 阿里云 大模型服务平台，支持Coding Plan

together.name: Together AI
together.description: Open source model cloud inference platform

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.description: Local + cloud model inference, no API Key required

huggingface.name: Hugging Face
huggingface.description: HF Inference API for open-source models

planMode.restricted: Plan Mode: AI will gather info and collaborate with you to create a plan
planMode.placeholder: Describe what you want to achieve...
planMode.editorPlaceholder:
Edit plan content here...

## Background
Describe the context: what problem to solve, why, and expected outcome

### Phase 1: Analysis
- [ ] Step description

### Phase 2: Implementation
- [ ] Step description
planMode.executeCommand: Start executing the plan. Complete each step in order, calling update_plan_step to track progress.

comment.hint: Select text to add comments and collaboratively refine the plan
comment.placeholder: Suggest changes for the selected content...

system.liveHistoryHint: Enable auto-refresh to record CPU / memory samples over time
